title: [codereview-P4] api.py: jammer position lacks NaN/Inf validation
description: python/src/lichen/sim/api.py:537-555 approx: add_chaos_jam does float conversions for x,y,z but no isfinite check like the new _parse_position. Could allow bad jammer positions leading to NaN in distance calcs. Fix by using or extending the helper. Tagged codereview. P4 treated as real work per task. Discovered in pass 2 of project-LICHEN-b5il review.
